Seminar Announcement (Prof. Adrian Bejan)

You are invited to Prof. Adrian Bejan's "Vascular Design: Freedom, Evolution, Hierarchy" seminar to be held online on May 3, 2023, at 16:00.

Date:

Time:

Speaker:

Prof. Adrian Bejan, J.A. Jones Distinguished Professor of Duke University, USA,

Topic:

Vascular Design: Freedom, Evolution, Hierarchy

Enjoy free admission, all are welcome.

Please register via:

https://tju-edu-tr.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_xgft6lFBSZu2AaaBr5oI2Q
